ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last updated */,
  "device_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device was created */,
  "device_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "device_mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the device */,
  "device_last_seen" TEXT /* The last time the device was seen or communicated with */,
  "device_owner" TEXT /* Owner or responsible person for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the partition type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the partition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the partition subtype */,
  "subtype_description" TEXT /* Description of the partition subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device where the configuration is applied */,
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partition being configured */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "config_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the configuration data */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., applied, pending, failed) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the configuration was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partition_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the firmware */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the firmware version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware version was released */,
  "version_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the firmware */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware version (e.g., released, deprecated, testing) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or release notes for the firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the firmware version being applied */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "update_start_time" TEXT /* Date and time the update started */,
  "update_end_time" TEXT /* Date and time the update ended */,
  "update_log" TEXT /* Log of the update process */,
  "update_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the update data */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the update (e.g., bug fix, new feature) */,
  "update_trigger" TEXT /* The trigger for the update (e.g., manual, scheduled, automatic) */,
  "update_rollbacks" INTEGER /* The number of rollbacks for this update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* The last time the user performed any activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device involved in the action */,
  "log_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* The source of the log entry (e.g., system, user, device) */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context or details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
